title: 100 Pieces Disposable Iodine Cotton Swabs, Iodine Disinfected Cotton Swab, Individually Packaged Iodine Swabs for Wound Skin Cleansing
features: Packaging: You will receive 100 Pcs Disposable iodine swabs are individually wrapped in plastic film, clean and safe,avoid cross infection

Effortless One-Step Application: Simply snap the marked end, and the liquid iodine flows instantly to the cotton tip—no spills, no fuss. The dual-ended design allows for precise wound cleaning, nasal care, ear hygiene, or makeup touch-ups, making these iodine swabsticks a must-have for home, gym, or travel

Easy to Use: Experience mess-free wound care! Simply tear the packaging along the bright orange line, then gently snap the pre-scored red mark on the swab stick. Our Iodine for Wounds Cotton Swabs instantly release the solution, saturating the opposite cotton tip. Apply these Disposable Iodine Cotton Swabs directly to the wound for gentle, effective disinfection in seconds.

Compact & Travel-Ready for Emergencies: Lightweight and individually packed, these iodine cotton swabs fit effortlessly in purses, car kits, or backpacks. Whether for sports injuries, camping, or daily hygiene, they offer instant care—portable, and mess-free

Gentle Yet Powerful Protection: These iodophor swabs are gentle on sensitive skin. Ideal for wounds, cuts, burns, and pre-injection cleansing, they minimise irritation for adults, children, and even pets
description: 【Specification】 Material: Cotton Color: Transparent Size: 8 x 0.5 cm / 3.14 x 0.19 in Package included: 100 x Disposable Iodine Cotton Swabs
